modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to edit and move video in Panopto

full_description_text: 
The user called in asking to edit a video in Panopto. They also need to move the recording to a different folder. It seems they are having trouble with these tasks in the system.

description: The user called in asking to edit a video in Panopto. They also need to move the recording to a different folder. It seems they are having trouble with these tasks in the system.
